subcodes.first_line: O Taqi! The Wronged One hath heard thy call and hath answered thee. He heareth and answereth; verily, He is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing, with manifest certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا تقی ان المظلوم سمع ندائک و اجابک یسمع و یجیب و هو السامع البصیر بیقین مبین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
